global.seoTitle: Proguild Facility Management — Safe, Innovative, Socially Responsible
global.seoDesc: One dependable partner for every building system — commercial facility management and 24/7 emergency repair across Arizona.

contact.address: 101 N Colorado St, Ste 1201, Chandler, AZ 85225

footer.blurb: Commercial facility management & emergency repair. Safe, innovative, and socially responsible service across Arizona.
footer.copyright: Proguild Facility Management. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Safe, Innovative, and Socially Responsible Facility Management Services
hero.body: One dependable partner for every building system — maintenance and emergency repair handled quickly, cleanly, and by people you can trust on site.

quote.text: "We treat every property as if it were our own — responsive when it matters, meticulous in the details, and always accountable for the result."

mission.title: Dependable service, delivered with integrity and transparency
mission.body1: Proguild exists to keep commercial properties safe, functional, and welcoming. We combine skilled trades, modern coordination, and a genuine sense of responsibility to the people and communities our buildings serve.
mission.body2: Whether it's a midnight emergency or a planned preventive program, we show up prepared, communicate clearly, and finish the job right — because the trust of the people we work for is the only foundation worth building on.

why.title: A promise you can set your watch by

items.title: Professional service
items.text: Licensed, insured, uniformed crews who respect your property and your tenants.

items.title: Consistent updates
items.text: Clear communication from dispatch to completion — you're never left guessing.

items.title: Acknowledged in 5 minutes
items.text: Every work order is confirmed within five minutes, day or night.

items.title: Transparent invoicing
items.text: Itemized, up-front pricing on every invoice — no hidden fees, no surprises.

items.title: Faith
items.body: We lead with conviction and do what's right even when no one is watching.

items.title: Customer Focus
items.body: Your priorities set ours. Every decision starts with the people we serve.

items.title: Synergy
items.body: One coordinated team across every trade, working better together than apart.

items.title: Effective Communication
items.body: Clear, timely, honest updates at every step — no surprises.

items.title: Empowerment
items.body: We equip our people to make smart calls and own the outcome.

items.title: Excellence
items.body: Good enough never is. We hold every job to a standard we'd accept ourselves.

steps.title: Submit a work order
steps.body: Call, email, or send a request — whatever's fastest for you.

steps.title: Acknowledged in 5 min
steps.body: We confirm receipt within five minutes, any hour.

steps.title: ETA within 30 min
steps.body: You get a dependable on-site arrival window.

steps.title: Completed with updates
steps.body: Work done right, with status updates through to sign-off.

services.title: Total facility care, under one roof

items.title: Plumbing
items.desc: Leaks, fixtures, repipes, and 24/7 emergency response.

items.title: HVAC
items.desc: Heating, cooling, and preventive maintenance plans.

items.title: Locksmith
items.desc: Rekeys, hardware, and secure access control.

items.title: Emergency Board-Ups
items.desc: Rapid storefront securing after break-ins or damage.

items.title: General Maintenance
items.desc: Handyman work and ongoing upkeep of all kinds.

items.title: Preventive Programs
items.desc: Scheduled inspections that catch issues early.

coverage.title: Where we show up
coverage.lead: Hover or tap a state to see its coverage level.

cta.title: Become a trusted partner
cta.sub: Acknowledged in 5 minutes. ETA within 30. Any building system, any hour.

contact.title: Tell us what your building needs
contact.lead: Send a request and a coordinator will follow up promptly. For active emergencies, call us — someone always answers.
contact.successText: Thanks — a coordinator will reach out shortly.
